summary.description:
Today, a bit warmer for the outside temperature (up 3.3°C) and feels like temperature (up 2.0°C).

The past week and month had observable variation in the amount of wind (up 21 miles) and light levels (down 3964 lux) when compared to today.

The cloud levels yesterday fell between 436m minimum and 1505m maximum, with an average of 966.4m; weekly and monthly averages were marginally higher at 871.5m and 860.1m.

summary.summary: Inside; temperature should feel pleasantly mild. Outside; hot temperatures throughout the day. Also, the air will feel noticeably humid and uncomfortable and some wind, breezy at times. A few light raindrops may fall, partial cloudiness with some periods of sun, and very bright daylight. Similar weather conditions should remain.
